anthropic_usage.reason: Anthropic does not expose a programmatic usage/billing API. Token consumption and cost data is only accessible via console.anthropic.com — requires browser login.
anthropic_usage.how_to_check: Go to https://console.anthropic.com/settings/billing to view current month usage and cost
anthropic_usage.known_context: Credits were reportedly exhausted on 2026-03-25. Current status unknown without console access.
